description.value: Lightning arcs to 4 targets within range (first target, then 3 others within 30ft of previous). Each target makes their own [[/save type=reflex]]. Calculate net successes for each target.

system.effect: Lightning arcs to 4 targets within range (first target, then 3 others within 30ft of previous). Each target makes their own Reflex save. Calculate net successes for each target.
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = miss, 1 = Half damage (20), 2 = Full damage (40), 3 = Enhanced damage (48) + applies effects
system.weavingRoll: Air Potential + Air Mastery + Space Potential + Space Mastery
